Title: Jawan: A Cinematic Triumph Blending Bollywood Star Power and South Indian Grandeur
review:
"Jawan" emerges as a true cinematic entertainer, captivating audiences from the very first frame to its final moments. The film's cinematography and editing exhibit a level of sophistication that effortlessly rivals Hollywood standards. Notably, certain sequences within "Jawan" can be favorably compared to the iconic moments found in films such as Mission Impossible.

What distinguishes "Jawan" from the crowd is its distinct South Indian essence, outshining many facets of Bollywood's filmmaking. The movie masterfully blends the opulence of South Indian cinema with the star power characteristic of Bollywood. It serves as a testament to how regional cinema can push boundaries and establish new benchmarks.

A standout element of "Jawan" is Shah Rukh Khan's exceptional performance. His portrayal transcends the abilities of many of today's younger actors. Khan's charisma and acting prowess resonate powerfully throughout the film, rendering his character captivating and utterly engaging.

In summary, "Jawan" stands as a cinematic triumph, seamlessly merging the best of South Indian and Bollywood traditions. The film enchants with its compelling narrative, polished production values, and Shah Rukh Khan's stellar acting. It unquestionably qualifies as a must-watch for cinephiles.

Moving on to the movie's content, "Jawan" provides a refreshing twist to the conventional Bollywood blockbuster. Shah Rukh Khan reaffirms his status as the undisputed King of Bollywood, showcasing remarkable versatility in this endeavor. While the film ambitiously explores a diverse range of themes and ideas, it occasionally grapples with maintaining a firm grip on its narrative.

One of the film's standout attributes is Shah Rukh Khan's seamless transitions between diverse roles. Whether portraying a gruff bald vigilante or a compassionate prison warden, Khan's performance highlights his exceptional acting prowess. His enthusiasm for portraying such a variety of characters shines through.

The movie commences with a mesmerizing sequence featuring a bandaged soldier emerging as a messiah, saving a besieged village. This visually stunning scene sets the stage for the film's grandeur. The action sequences, replete with drones, helicopters, and gatling guns, are executed with slick precision, keeping audiences thoroughly engaged.

Director Atlee infuses the action with an unmistakable Indian touch, adding authenticity to the larger-than-life set pieces. Subtle nods to social justice issues enhance the narrative, with Khan's character embarking on a Clean India campaign, challenging various societal institutions.

"Jawan" pays homage to both Bollywood and Hollywood, peppered with references that cinephiles will delight in spotting. However, the film occasionally ventures into melodramatic territory in its second half, and some of the songs come across as generic. Nevertheless, Vijay Sethupathi delivers a standout performance in later scenes, while Nayanthara adds a cool, understated demeanor to her character.

In a particularly memorable scene, Khan delivers an impassioned speech on democracy and the significance of a single vote, a message that resonates deeply in today's polarized climate.

"Jawan" is a rollercoaster ride driven by Shah Rukh Khan's magnetic presence. While it may not ascend to the ranks of his most enduring films, it undeniably serves as a captivating showcase of star power and a thrilling Friday-night watch.

In summary, "Jawan" celebrates Khan's remarkable acting range, offers a visual spectacle with nods to diverse cinematic influences, and reinforces the enduring appeal of Shah Rukh Khan in Indian cinema.

Title: Overrated movie
review:
I recently had the unfortunate experience of watching Jawan movie, and I can honestly say that it was one of the most excruciatingly terrible films I have ever had the displeasure of sitting through. I wouldn't wish this cinematic catastrophe upon my worst enemy.

First and foremost, the plot was an absolute mess. It felt like the script was written by a group of middle school students during their lunch break. The storyline was convoluted, filled with plot holes you could drive a truck through, and lacked any semblance of coherence. I kept wondering if the writers had any idea where they were going with this train wreck of a narrative.

The acting was equally abysmal. I've seen better performances in a high school drama class. The cast seemed completely disinterested in their roles, delivering their lines with all the enthusiasm of a soggy cardboard box. It was painful to watch such a talented ensemble of actors waste their talents on this dumpster fire of a movie.

Title: Jawan Movie: A Disappointing Masala Mess
review:
I recently had the misfortune of watching "Jawan," and I must say it was an absolute waste of my time and money. This film is a prime example of everything that is wrong with the Bollywood industry today.

First and foremost, the movie is nothing more than a mindless masala flick that lacks any semblance of a coherent storyline. It's as if the filmmakers decided to throw together a mishmash of clichés and expected the audience to buy into it. There's no originality here, and you can predict every twist and turn before it happens.

One of the most glaring issues with "Jawan" is its relentless focus on Shahrukh Khan's character. Don't get me wrong; I have nothing against Shahrukh Khan as an actor, but it's as if the entire film revolves around him and him alone. It's an egotistical display of star power that overshadows any potential for a well-rounded ensemble cast.

The movie shamelessly attempts to portray itself as a patriotic ode to the nation, but it's a laughable and failed attempt. Patriotism should be depicted with sincerity and depth, not through superficial and forced elements with over-the-top dialogues. "Jawan" feels like a cheap ploy to cash in on the patriotic sentiment of the audience without adding any substance to the narrative.

Furthermore, the film is filled with cringe-worthy dialogues and unnecessary action sequences that only serve to prolong the agony of watching it. It's evident that the filmmakers relied on star power rather than a well-constructed script to carry the movie.

In conclusion, "Jawan" is a perfect example of what happens when a film prioritizes style over substance. It's a mind-numbing masala movie with an incoherent plot, excessive focus on a single actor, and a failed attempt at patriotism.

Title: Commercial Cinema at its peak
review: After a long hiatus, Bollywood finally gets its due. The emergence of Pan India biggies from South India has been demolishing every Bollywood film for the past three years. But this time, SRK saved Bollywood once again after 'Pathaan.' 'Jawan,' directed by South Indian blockbuster filmmaker Atlee, boasts an ensemble cast comprising Sanya Malhotra, Priyamani, and others, with Shah Rukh in the titular role and the main antagonist played by Vijay Sethupati. The screenplay is pacy and keeps the audience hooked until the end. However, the first half is almost too good to be true. The second half is quite rushed, but SRK saves the day with his unmatchable swagger and incredible acting skills. The music by Anirudh is outstanding, elevating every massy moment. 'Jawan' is not a typical no-brainer mass film; it has ample amounts of good content with amazingly choreographed action sequences. Each and every character and crew member gave their best, which clearly shows on screen. Hats off to Atlee for turning SRK into a mass action hero and for giving us something that has been missing for years.

Title: Mindboggling & Mindless .. risky watch !
review: Movie Jawan is a typical example of how not to spend hundreds of bucks on poor cinema watching affair. Infact to save such a hassle for commoners, OTT platforms such as Amazon Prime do release fresh movies. Villan Vijay Sir looks like he was forced to act in this movie! It is also very evident that many scenes are scripted in order to slate the songs. And the amount of make up on SRK(aazad) was unnecessary. Female lead has been portrayed to be more badass than Charlie's Angels which eventually fizzles out. The story line & plot is very weak. There is too much the director is trying to tell within 2.3 hrs of running time. Action scenes are mostly avoidable except for the one fight scene amongst the girls. Only positive is the valid message that this movie comes with - Use your vote after thorough deliberations. SRK fans can have few awwww moments. Apart from that this movie is insipid.....

Title: JAI JAWAN!!
review:
Finally watched the most talked about Bollywood film of recent times JAWAN and it is full on entertaining with ignorable glitches!

2023 has been the year of Shahrukh Khan and after the blockbuster PATHAAN he is again back with more action packed version here.

Atlees grand actioner is a full on masala Hindi film with dollops of spices taken liberally from Tamil cinema as well.

The film is about Shahrukh Khan(s) in the title role and also stars Nayanthara, Vijay Setupathy in important roles. The film has strong social and political statement as well which are shown well within the commercial larger than life cinema limits. Shahrukh Khan owns the film like he did in Pathaan. Though I have never been a fan of his die hard romantic image,I must say he is terrific in action avtar. In some close ups he looks aged but his energy and his swag in post interval is unmatchable. Nayanthara holds her own opp SRK and shines in the film. Vijay is menacing as villain but I loved him more in Vikram Vedha and Farzi. Of the remaining cast, Deepika makes an impact with her strong cameo. Film fans will find some connect from Hindi films like Desh Premee,Aakhree Raasta,Sarfarosh(Jeetendra),),A Wednesday and Shankars vigilante based Tamil films like Indian(Hindustani),Gentleman,Aparachit and even Shivaji. Traces of earlier SRK films like Main Hoon Naa and Swades also can be seen. Atlee ofcourse mixes all these in his films Bigil, Marsal and presents King Khan in a full massy avtar. The songs are disappointing but Anirudhs Background score is awesummm. Some of the scenes are heavy and taxing but overall the film has great pace. The action scenes are excellent and many sequences are thrilling. I remember seeing SRK first time as a JAWAN in my childhood in serial Fauji,and now after Pathaan he shows with Jawan that his action avtar is to stay here!!

Jai Jawan Jai Pathan!!!

Title: Box office Havvoc🌊🔥💥
review:
Jawan" is a gripping and engaging movie that brings together the best of Bollywood and Tollywood cinema. Directed by Atlee in his first Hindi film, the movie shines with a well-written storyline that keeps the audience hooked from start to finish.

The highlight of the film is undoubtedly Shah Rukh Khan's spectacular return, portraying a double role in this action-packed thrilling movie. His performance is a testament to his versatility as an actor, and fans will be delighted to see him in top form.

The movie's plot revolves around the current political situation, shedding light on the issues faced by the common man due to BJP's corrupt politicians and high-level scams in government sectors. It effectively portrays the struggles of farmers and the general public, making it highly relatable for all viewers.

With a strong patriotic undertone, "Jawan" underscores the importance of soldiers (Jawans) in safeguarding the country from corrupt politicians and a flawed government system. It carries a powerful message for upcoming elections, resonating with the patriotic sentiment of the audience.

The film boasts an ensemble cast featuring Nayanthara, Vijay Sethupathi, Deepika Padukone, and a special appearance by Sanjay Dutt. Each actor delivers commendable performances, adding depth to the narrative.

Overall, "Jawan" is a thrilling and patriotic cinematic experience that combines stellar performances, a compelling storyline, and excellent direction. It's a must-watch for those who enjoy action-packed dramas with a dose of social relevance. Kudos to Gauri Khan, Gaurav Verma, and Red Chillies Entertainment for bringing this thought-provoking film to the audience.

Title: Shah Rukh Khan - The King of Bollywood

Title: Such a horrible atrocity should have never been inflicted on makind
Wonderful movie with great message love the acting of Srk
Atlee's special Khichdi made out of Atlee's own stale films, by adding the delicious ingredient called S R K.
review:
King Khan's new outing, written and directed by Atlee is about a vigilante and his 6 member women team, taking matters into their own hands to get justice. Ironically, the common guy related to every issue the gang tackles is Kaali Gaikwad. As Kaali retaliates, a ghost from the past is brought back from the dead and how does the goodie gang mete out justice while throw some speeches at the society, forms rest of the story.

Atlee's screenplay is basically mishmash of all his films before and his usual signature move of lifting scenes / plot points from several others. What Jawan has is multiple flashbacks and a story fit in between them which leaves SRK to do the heavy lifting which he does with aplomb. The screenplay gets too repetitive with those flashbacks with one issue after another is tackled and even resolved in unimaginative way, only to be saved by the charismatic lead and well conceived actual sequences.

The emotions look forced throughout the film and not once it feels organic. So rather pointing out the flaws in the writing, I would prefer pointing out why the film was perfect to watch on the big screen. RCE delivers big time with the grand visuals and the fan service done here is near perfect. As much as the screenplay tires you out, SRK doesn't and we get double dose of him. There's a particular chase sequence in the second half which leads upto a special cameo and this whole segment alone makes it a worthy visit to the theater.

Coming to the performances, it's an all out Shah Rukh Khan show. Nayanthara gets an insipid role, she looks stunning on screen but she deserved more. The six member gang, only three of them get a flashback each so in that order, Lehar Khan as Kalki, Sanya Malhotra as Eeram and Priyamani as Lakshmi leave a mark. Among other three, Sanjeeta Bhattacharya as Helena the hacker and Girija Oak as Ishkra the artist get a solid intro shots but later they don't get much to do. Deepika Padukone in a special appearance is passable as again, she doesn't get much to do. Vijay Sethupathi as the main villain brings some humor in the climax but it is a one toned character requiring a one toned performance and in the end, it just feels that he wasn't utilized well.

Anti-establishment stories need much more than overdramatic scenes stemming out of a gruesome death. One wishes, Atlee to have learned better from Shankar. If he had, then he would've been the master by now instead of failing to deliver a credible screenplay. Here's hoping for Atlee to get better with his craft. Original or not, he has it in him to tackle this genre and all he needs is to rely on his script more than the superstar he signs to be the lead.

Title: SRK played a unique, starring role
review:
I entered the theatre to watch a big-budget film in which SRK played a unique, starring role. I didn't realise how much more was in store for me. Atlee has not only met but also beyond all expectations, and RCE VFX studio has established a new standard in Indian filmmaking. The movie whizzed through like a light gust of wind despite its 160-minute running duration.

This film will transport you back to the golden age of Bollywood, as it boldly reflected the status quo and exhorted viewers to expect more from those in positions of authority. When speaking to his fans through his work in the third act, SRK almost breaks the fourth wall. Jawan is advising you to demand greatness from your elected leaders, regardless of their affiliations, despite the fact that some may feel this is not what they signed up for and it's too political.

With regard to action, this film has set pieces that might compete with Hollywood, excluding the final Vijay-SRK fight scene, which was a classic Atlee action scene in which no attempt was made to conceal the cable. With its quick cuts, one vehicle chase sequence reminded me of Fast and Furious, while another one reminded me of Taken. Furthermore, a clip from a border battle mission is expertly edited with long shots.

In general, you should view this movie on a big screen.

Title: Awareness + entertainment 👌
review:
I'm glad to share a more detailed review of the movie:

This film truly left a profound impact on me. It goes beyond being just a movie; it marks the beginning of a new and promising genre in cinema. The storytelling and execution were truly remarkable, showcasing the potential of this genre to inspire and captivate audiences.

In a world where entertainment often takes precedence over substance, we need more content like this to remind us of the possibilities within an ideal society. This movie managed to strike a balance between entertainment and education, making it a perfect blend of both. The way it seamlessly delivered important messages while keeping us engaged was truly commendable.

From start to finish, the film held my attention and left me in awe of the creativity and thoughtfulness that went into its making. The educational aspect of the movie was on point, offering valuable insights that left a lasting impression. It's a testament to the power of cinema to educate and inspire.

In conclusion, this film deserves every bit of praise it's receiving. It's a game-changer, setting the bar high for future films in this genre. I can't wait to see more content like this that not only entertains but also enlightens and encourages us to envision a better world. It's a must-watch, and I highly recommend it to everyone seeking a meaningful cinematic experience. 👌

Title: Complete entertainer that will make you want to rewatch it again and again
review:

Title: Blockbuster And Entertaining. (Non-spoiler)
review:
"Jawan" Is an entertaining ride that tells a spectacular story of a soldier. The movie has lots of action and a good story that keeps you interested all the way through. What makes "Jawan" stand out
You guessed it right. It's Mr. Shah Rukh Khan.

Shah Rukh Khan is spectacular🔥

This film is a perfect blend of stylish and intense action and emotional moments. It's like a rollercoaster of emotions with explosions and heroism sprinkled in.

Jawan also benefits from a captivating soundtrack that enhances the emotional impact of key scenes. The music by Anirudh leaves a lasting impression and all the songs are enjoyable.

Atlee did what he does best, creates another entertaining blockbuster.

If you really want to have a good time and a cinematic thrilling ride, then Jawan is the blockbuster you've been waiting for!

Don't miss it!

Title: Unbearable
review:
The movie became unbearable within 30 minutes due to over-the-top acting, a poor script, and screenplay. It's another disappointment after Pathan. While it might be a blockbuster, trust me, it's a complete waste of time. Surprised by the excessive hype an Oscar nomination discussions. This is easily one of the worst movies of the year showcasing filmmaking at its lowest with a lack of creativity. What is happening with Bollywood?

Pls opt for OTT platforms and shortlist content to watch; don't waste your precious time on such movies. SRK forgot audiences who liked his movies like Chakde, Swades, Dear Zindagi etc for commercial success and money-making business.

Title: It's not just film it's also protest
review:
This movie is a masterpiece. It's not just a film; it's a protest. The movie beautifully portrays the extent of societal corruption. It speaks for the common people, every story in this movie is true. It's a movie crafted from real-life stories. I haven't seen such a movie in Bollywood before. Seeing Shah Rukh Khan in such a role is truly extraordinary. The film depicts the sufferings and injustices faced by oppressed people in society brilliantly. Everyone should watch this movie, especially politicians."

Shah Rukh Khan has worked hard even at an older age. The acting of every character here is fantastic. It doesn't just offer a movie; it speaks for the oppressed people in society. It delivers a message on how one individual can lead the country's politics in the right direction if desired. Bollywood should produce more movies like this. There was no flaw in the movie; it's the best I've seen. The movie's BGM, attitude, and action, everything was outstanding.

Title: Disappointing !
review:
It's a mismash of several Bollywood Tollywood flicks of the 70s 80s 90s. A little bit of sholay, a pinch of Aakhri Raasta, an entire flashback copied from dharti putra, and the basic theme of Kamla Hasan's Hindustani. The final product is bad. Atlee has had no control over the direction here. But Shahrukh shines and so does Deepika in her cameo appearance. The music is shockingly disappointing.

Well we aren't actually known for being originals but then how much it copy paste can one indulge into ? And there are so many characters that it's difficult to give enough or equal footage. The characterisation is so bad.

Title: A Disappointing Misfire: Jawan Fails to Deliver on Its Promises
review:
Anticipation for Shah Rukh Khan's latest action-thriller, Jawan, was high, given the superstar's immense popularity and the film's grand scale. However, the film falls far extremely short of expectations, delivering a convoluted & boring plot, uninspired action sequences, and lackluster performances.

The story revolves around Jawan (Khan), a soldier with a rare condition that causes him to experience a constant feeling of loss. When his family is threatened, he embarks on a mission to save them, encountering a host of adversaries along the way.

The film's premise has potential, but the execution is woefully inadequate and to some extent pathetic. The plot is convoluted and meandering, with numerous subplots that fail to connect or add depth to the narrative. The action sequences, while plentiful, lack originality and fail to generate any excitement.

Shah Rukh Khan, despite his star power, struggles to carry the film. His performance feels subdued and lacking in the charisma that has made him a Bollywood icon. The supporting cast, including Nayanthara and Vijay Sethupathi, is equally underwhelming, with their characters poorly developed and lacking in substance.

The film's technical aspects are equally disappointing. The cinematography is uninspired, failing to capture the grandeur and scale that the story demands. The editing is choppy and inconsistent, disrupting the flow of the narrative. The background score is forgettable, failing to add any emotional resonance to the film's scenes.

Overall, Jawan is a disappointing misfire that fails to live up to its potential. The convoluted plot, uninspired action sequences, and lackluster performances make it a tedious and forgettable experience. Shah Rukh Khan fans may find some solace in seeing their favorite star on screen, but even they will likely be disappointed by the film's shortcomings.

Title: 10 times watching movie
review: Everything available in one movie.30 years after that explosive opening, we meet Khan - now playing a goofy, wisecracking vigilante with a bald head -as he hijacks a metro train in Mumbai. He's assisted by a squad of female fighters, most of whom get names and a few elite ones backstories. Also on the train is Alia, the daughter of a dead-eyed arms dealer named Kaali (Vijay Sethupathi in a mean beard). It's revealed soon enough - spoilers ahead - that Khan in the present timeline is actually Azad Rathore, the jailer of a high-security women's prison who moonlights as an ethical terrorist. What's more, Azad is set to marry Narmada (Nayanthara), the fearless negotiator he was making song requests to while leading the hijack.

Title: Masterpiece
review: Nayanthara does well with the limited screen time she has. Even though she had a fantastic start to the character in the first half, somehow that performance isn't so stand-out in the second half. In the second half, she just turns into being one of the girls and there is no 'lady superstar' kind of sexiness to the character anymore. That hurts. Feels like her character was written half-baked and left high and dry in the middle. Atlee's direction brings to Bollywood from South Cinema what B-Town films have been missing in the past 2-3 years - escapist heroism. Jawan' is without a doubt a full paisa vasool. Shah Rukh Khan's swagger is unmatchable. In an action avatar, he has nailed it not just in one but two roles.

Title: Unrealistic boredom
review:
"Jawaan" is an abysmal excuse for a movie. It's so unrealistic that I found myself questioning whether the filmmakers had any grasp of reality. The entire film reeks of a purely commercial agenda, with no regard for storytelling depth or artistic value.

The plot is a convoluted mess, filled with sequences that defy all logic and reason. The characters are one-dimensional, and their actions make no sense whatsoever. It's clear that the sole purpose of this movie is to milk the audience for every penny, with no consideration for offering a meaningful cinematic experience.

The dialogues are cringe-worthy, and the attempts at emotional depth are laughable at best. It's a shame to see talented actors wasted in a film that has no substance or artistic merit.

In conclusion, "Jawaan" is a prime example of everything that's wrong with commercial cinema. It's unrealistic, purely commercial, and devoid of any depth or meaning. Save your time and money, and steer clear of this cinematic disaster.

review:

Some were cringe but funny to so didn't gave -1.

TOTAL: 7.7/10

All over a good movie to watch if you are getting bored on weekends or just wanna have fun watching any movie with ur family and friends.

Title: The last of the Stars- SRK
review:
People who should watch this film:
1. Die-hard SRK fans
2. Indian Citizens who are paying attention to what's really happening
3. Anyone interested in learning how a massive super-star can use his voice and platform for good.

Is this movie flawless? No. But watch it for the message, for the dizzying sequences of "action", for the screen presence of SRK and all the performers with him. He says what needs to be said, does it in the classiest but also massiest way possible with hard-hitting dialogues, emotive moments and firecracked background music.

In my eyes, Shah Rukh Khan can do no wrong, but even with my subjective view- go watch the movie, it speaks for itself. Kudos to the last of the stars- he is the man, the myth the legend. Phenomenal movie- incredibly moving and will stay with you for days afterwards.

Title: Jawan Review
review:
If you have watched a few movies within the IMDB TOP 250, then you know what makes it so good. This movie is exactly opposite of any good cinema. The movie is a combination of disastrous directing, story writing, actions devoid of logic and an abundance of mindboggling plot holes.

The director is completely clueless as what he wants to do with the lackluster story that he got. The story is absolutely lacking of any proper cohesion at all. A masterful disasterclass from the director.

Some people might argue that the action is worth watching. Though after seeing it, you realize it is just some characters flying around doing random stuff with no consequences or force behind them.

Title: Jawan - A most memorable film
review: As a fan of Shah Rukh Khan, I have watched almost all of his movies - many more than once. And Pathaan must be 30 times...I just love that movie. Yet Jawan is special. There is an incredible story told asynchronously. And by time film ends all pieces fit perfectly. Every cast member performed in stellar fashion. But SRK was especially magnificent. No spoilers here, you will have to watch to see why. The cinematography was excellent; film shows landscapes and architecture that is quite beautiful and at times, stark. The action is amazing and makes sense. Music and dancing are perfectly woven into the story. You will not want the film to end. Even the ending with credit rolling is a joy to watch. Kudos to Atlee Kumar and his team and all the support staff who brought us this wonderful entertainment. I have now seen it twice. If I could give it more than 10 stars, I would. I think this is one for the record books.

Title: A mix of everything what makes you want to throw up.
Indian Cenimatic Brilliance
review:
A Perfect cenima from Atlee with a visual elivating music by Anirudh and a feel high characterisation.

The most amazing thing about the movie is presenting the King Khan SRK in unexpected mass variations. Still I am confused how this 57 years old man did these amazing stunts and dance in the film. Yes because he is SRK. And our anti-hero Vijay Setupati asusually great and organic acting. Surprised with Ninatara performance especially in action sequels.

Coming to technical aspects, At first I felt that I am watching a Hollywood movie. Hollywood level cenimatography, great looking vfx that I never expected, very high scale grand sets and special mention to SFX and Music. Anirudh again hyped the movie.

The only con of the film is the mixed ideology of South films. But take it as a tribute to south films 😅.

So, even the director adapted many scenes from other films, at last its all presented in a Atlee way. A perfect film made with the combination of message, commercial, action, and entertainer rarely found across the Bollywood.

This can be the biggest blockbuster and deserves 1000 crores.

Title: What did I watch? And most importantly, why?
review:
You want to create a movie to break all records. What are the ingredients that are needed:

1. Superstars from North AND South. Release the movie simultaneously in Hindi, Tamil AND Telugu. Don't leave anything to chance here. (And for good measure make SRK play a double role)

2. Iconic South Indian-style mass scenes involving stylish smoking hunk superhero man.

3. Compelling backstory of characters

4. Mind-boggling 1 hero vs 40 villains action scenes, superbly shot with slow-mo cuts.

5. SRK dance-songs with Deepika Padukone

6. New age concepts like Mumbai Metro, women power, and Tibetan struggles to attract modern audience.

Now mix it all up with ABSOLUTELY NO logic or thought. No worries, the audience will eat it all up and your movie will still break all records.

Title: SRK is back with a Bang!

Perfect double performance by the king of Bollywood. Great story and not too long of short of a movie. I haven't watched a fantastic Bollywood movie in years, But this was exactly what I was looking for and I'm sure most people when watching it will say the same!!!!

Title: Super
review:
Jawan is an extraordinary work of art that captivates audiences from start to finish. With its brilliant storytelling mesmerizing visuals and outstanding performances this film has truly raised the bar for cinematic excellence.

One of the most remarkable aspects of jawan is its gripping narrative. The screenplay expertly weaves together a complex and thought-provoking storyline that keeps viewers on the edge of their seats. Whether it's the exhilarating action sequences or the emotional character arcs every moment feels carefully crafted and essential to the overarching plot.

Visually jawan is an absolute feast for the eyes. The cinematography is breathtaking capturing stunning landscapes and intricate details with precision. The use of color palettes and lighting enhances the mood and atmosphere immersing the audience into the world of the film. From elaborate set designs to seamless visual effects every frame is a visual spectacle.

Title: Fake movie made for low class audience
review:
A bland movie. Is this film made by a director or a makeup artist? Fake action scenes & I don't know why the south directors are obsessed with slow motion because there was too much of slow motion going onscreen.

I don't know where the future of bollywood is going if these types of movies are making tons of money.

Our lead & his team solve major problems so easily like it's a child play. The director has watched money heist & made it in a typical Indian fashion for the general audience who doesn't like to use their brain while watching a film.

The performances are also average & over the top.

SRK, yes, a nice personality in real life but he surely can't act & this film proves it. Nyanthara was trying hard not to laugh in every single scene & the all girls cast was extremely forgettable. The only performance I enjoy was of Vijay Sethupati, at least he made me laugh intentionally in most of the scenes he was in.

At last, people should stop overhyping & overrating these type of films.

Title: Massive 🔥🔥
review: One of the best of all the time movie of srk All time blockbaster 🔥🔥🔥Nobody match with global star king of bollywood ,Badshah of bollywood king srk .Much more love from Nepal 🇳🇵🇳🇵🇳🇵🇳🇵JAWAN. The story of an army officer who has been wronged and his son who later picks up the pieces of what his father set out to do is super-high on emotional drama and theatrics. Shah Rukh's double role as the father and son was a smooth move and that is perhaps Atlee's only ace of spade in a screenplay that is deeply interspersed with potholes and flaws. A special shout-out to Nayanthara, who acts as the perfect support to SRK in the film. But Shah Rukh's army of girls and their mission to become Robin Hood for the downtrodden and needy is not new as a concept - Money Heist did it recently and Kamal Haasan's Indian has done it in the past.

These type of mass movie suits south stars and the audience of the south. I want that version of SRK that is very creative in its script and acting. From a very long time he is doing kovies with a very normal script. I believe in Raj kumar Hirani Diecrtion and he will do justice with him and Dunki is going to be a massive success for him. But for this direction was good but the script was poor. And with too much of bgm the character of the movie got lost and everyone around me in the theatre was disappointed.

Title: Srk is the last of the Stars no doubt
review: Shah Rukh Khan's impact on Bollywood and global cinema is undeniable. His enduring appeal and remarkable body of work have made him a true legend in the world of entertainment, and his performances continue to be celebrated by audiences worldwide. What I found particularly engaging in 'Jawaan' were the well-executed action sequences. They resonated with the kind of thrilling moments I've cherished in Shah Rukh Khan's action-packed films. The adrenaline rush and high-octane moments are universal, and 'Jawaan' delivers on this front admirably. 'Jawaan' is a prime example of the diversity within Indian cinema. While Shah Rukh Khan will always hold a special place in my heart, exploring movies like 'Jawaan' lets me appreciate the depth and talent that exists in different regional film industries. So, even though SRK might not be part of this one, it's a delightful cinematic journey worth taking for fans of compelling storytelling and solid performances."

Title: Really? Earned 1000 crore for this nonsense?
review: Sorry srk fans. This was such a terriblly put together unnecessary extravaganza. The story took a walk, the screenplay was poor, style took the lead and logic took a back seat. This was a mishmash of money heist and several other Indian movies. Absolute dissapointment. The songs were ill placed and the movie could have done without it. The dialogues were so Cheesy, wondered if it was off chatgpt. Can't believe this halfbaked grandure-enriched movie raked in 1000 crores. Feel bad for the makers of Tumbad. Serious introspection required. Watch ONLY if you are a hardcore srk fan. Watch with remote in hand.

Title: All time best so powerful..............
review: Jawan is an exceptional work of art that enthralls audiences from start to finish. Its brilliant storytelling, mesmerizing visuals, and outstanding performances have set a new standard for cinematic excellence's performances in Jawan are nothing short of exceptional. The cast delivers outstanding portrayals, breathing life into their characters and making them truly unforgettable. The lead actors shine with their nuanced performances, conveying a wide range of emotions that keep viewers emotionally invested throughout the film. The palpable chemistry between the actors enhances the authenticity of the on-screen relationships.

Title: Good film to watch
review:
Jawan is phenomenally entertaining and consistently engaging. It's Stylish, slick and action-packed film which l has actions, thrills, patriotism and gripping storyline. Shahrukh Khan has once again bounced back after the super success of Pathan with a bang and has made his fans delighted.

The movie begins with a bang introducing Shahrukh Khan as a mysterious man in a remote northeast village. JiVikram Rathore (Shah Rukh Khan), a dynamic soldier who chooses an unconventional way to help the society. He hijacks a metro train and holds the passengers as the hostages & puts forth his demands to Khaali Gaikwad (Vijay Sethupathi) Rest of the movie is all about Shahrukh Khan & Shahrukh Khan fighting against crony capitalism, bad loans, farmer suicides, neglected government hospitals, defective military weapons & dirty politics. This is what the film is about.

Jawan is a hard-hitting, exhilarating and equally thought-provoking action thriller where director Atlee uses the protagonist to convey a number of messages and says things that need to be said.

Talking of performances, SRK deliver exceptional performances. He looks very dashing and his performance is outstanding. He is brilliant in every frame. In some of the emotional moments, he's quite endearing. Without any doubt, SRK is the most charming guy in Bollywood. He's stylish, he's confident and has a different aura around him in this film. He truly leaves a mark in both his roles as Vikram Rathore and Azad.

Vijay Sethupathi brings his charm and gravitas. He is powerful and menacing. Nayanthara looks breathtaking in each and every frame she's in. She carries her role with Elan & has performed stunts effortlessly.

Deepika Padukone in a memorable special appearance has created an impact in her role. Priyamani, Sanya Malhotra, Ridhi Dogra, Lehar Khan, and Girija Oak are adequate in their respective roles.

Director Atlee is known for packing his movies with good entertainment elements, and with Jawan, too, he does the same. He presented Shah Rukh in the way fans wish to see him. Story is loaded with twists and turns. Screenplay is effective and engaging for most parts.

Anirudh's background is as-usually good, and it helps the film to go a few notches higher. GK Vishnu's cinematography deserves a special mention The film abounds in special effects and some of them are at par with international standards.

Title: Abhi to main ' Jawaan ' hoon
review:
After super success of Pathan , King Khan is back with another action extravaganza Jawaan which has typical flavour of South Indian films mixed with action and emotions apart from bit of romance.

Sadly it's only made to cater to hard core SRK fans and he gets inspired from Rajnikant in many scenes. Nayanthara makes a very good Hindi film debut but sadly her character has nothing much to do in the second half of the movie. Priyamani is wasted in a very small and meaning less role while Vijay has a very hard Tamil accent and he is not comfortable speaking Hindi dialogues. The songs are bad , not a single song is hummable but the background music is good. Action is very good and so is cinematography but overall the film fails big time to match the high expectations.

Watch it only if you are an out an out SRK Fans else don't waste your time and money by watching it.

Rishi Vij.

Title: Jawaan
review:
Masterpiece this movie is too good i got to experience it in hall and the hall went on fire and the atmosphere was too good in the hall and the movie i can't describe the feelings . Sharukhan and nayanthara chemistry was too good in the movie. You feel gossebumps in every 5 minute in the movie.

I loved watching it .it is worth it to watch and family friendly too. Talking about the songs the songs were too good in the film with different feel and vocal of great singer arijit singh.i recommended you to watch the film but don't be late don't miss the starting part guyz the entry of sharukhan is extremely mesmerizing .

Title: Must Watch
review:
"Jawan" is a highly entertaining film that brings together a stellar cast and exceptional music to deliver an engaging cinematic experience. I'd rate it 8/10 for its overall impact.

First and foremost, the music by Anirudh is nothing short of brilliant. His compositions add depth and emotion to the narrative, enhancing the viewing experience.

One of the highlights of "Jawan" is the unexpected cameos that surprise and delight the audience. These appearances add an element of intrigue and excitement to the storyline.

The performances by Shah Rukh Khan, Nayanthara, and Vijay Sethupati in their lead roles are commendable. Each actor brings their A-game to the table, delivering compelling and convincing portrayals of their characters.

Shah Rukh Khan's entry in the film is nothing short of electrifying, setting the tone for the rest of the movie. His charisma and presence on screen are truly captivating.

In summary, "Jawan" is a must-watch film that combines a strong storyline, exceptional music, unexpected surprises, and outstanding performances. It's a cinematic treat that will leave you thoroughly entertained and engaged throughout.

Title: Out of the world
review: One of my all-time favorite cinematic experiences. This film depicts various social and political dramas and realities. The all-star group gave an outstanding acting effort. The movie's screenplay and direction were excellent. Atlee is a master director who demonstrates to us how to create blockbuster films. This film is destined to become an enduring classic. Background music is the soul of the movie. Last but not least, Shahrukh Khan's performance is the heart and soul of the film. He is the genuine king of Bollywood because, as I mentioned, he nailed every appearance and persona. Knock the king down.

Title: jawan: A Gripping Cinematic Masterpiece That Leaves a Lasting Impact!
review:
"Jawan" is an exceptional film that takes you on an emotional rollercoaster from start to finish. The powerful performances by the cast, especially the lead actor, will leave you spellbound. The gripping storyline, filled with suspense and drama, keeps you at the edge of your seat throughout the movie. The direction and cinematography are top-notch, creating a visually stunning and immersive experience. "Jawan" is a must-watch for anyone who appreciates a well-crafted, thought-provoking film that leaves a lasting impact. Kudos to the entire team for delivering such a remarkable cinematic experience

SHUBHAM MK MONDAL.

Title: Devoid of meaning and lacking in direction. Waste of time
review:
Actors look utterly confused. Preachy content and yet no actual spunk. Meaningless scenes pieced together make no sense. An overall lack of coherence was blaringly explicit. Quite a pity that despite these glaring flaws, a few toxic sycophants are still writing tall stories in praise of their idol.

Slow motion action tremendously boring. The movie is irrationally violent. None of the women seem to have a significant role except the entitled Deepika. The villain is an absolute clown. Choppy and misfit scenes. Bad editing. Outrageous jail scene was absolutely absurd and laughable. Unrealistic and exaggerated extremes. Certainly one of the worst movies of 2023.

Title: MASS SRK
review:
Jawan has the best interval block of the century. It is also SRK's most politically charged film, if you thought that Pathaan had political undertones, wait till you watch Jawan, it is filled with social and political commentary. And it is an SRK film, so obviously it is meta with a capital M.

SRK is enjoying himself so much, he delivers a proper mass hero performance, the way Atlee presents him in mass elevation scenes is just next level. His best performance since FAN. SRK was superstarring like no other superstar has ever superstarred in the history of superstarring. Rest of the cast is brilliant too especially Nayanthara and Deepika.

Anirudh's music is kick-ass and takes action sequences to an insane level. God-tier stuff.

Atlee has cooked like no one has ever cooked in the history of cooking and has given us a mass hero for the ages. Will forever be grateful to him for this film and this character.

Title: Excellent! Monstrous performance by SRK
review:
After a long period of time I saw a Very Great Bollywood movie!

Just loved it.

Hail King Khan
I think everyone should watch this film before this movie goes out of the theatre. The Mighty BGM by Anirudh!! WOW!!! What is this mannnn!! He is BGM king!

Every time Vikram Rathore come in the screen with his mighty BGM. That gives Goosebump. The story is based on social issue which i liked the most! Deepika is exceptional. Nayanthara! You beauty! I badly fall on you!

You are unstoppable in this film!

Again Hail The King Khan!

ShahRukh Khan.

Title: 70-80s Stale Bollywood Stuff Again
review:
As expected it will be out n out Atlee Kumar South India cinema with slow motions father son story one cruel villain and all rounder protagonist. Nothing new rather would say Director himself mixed up his own old movies stuff like Theri Mersal Bigil into Jawan and also took references from Gabbar is back i.e Ramanna original film and Aakhree Rasta which was again a south remake.

Pretty ordinary movie with much overhyped and on similar lines with Pathaan in terms of commercial values. Latter was also huge disappointment for me and same goes with Jawaan not at all impressed with this one too.

Overall it is a 70-80s Stale Bollywood Stuff.

Acting Wise:

Srk pretty ordinary nothing new except a short role in aged where he looked little good and performed better.

Nayanthara : Could have been easily replaced by any other A list actor. She was of no use in this movie

Vijay: Again he's been stereotyped as a villain now still can't get over his Master's performance.

Rest other : Will be overshadowed by srk overhyped presence.

Deepika and Sanjay Dutt : Leave no such impact on the film.

Film could have been 20 mins shorter though.

Hoping Some good story telling and acting from Srk in Dunki.

Title: Uuuuuhhhhhh.... What did I just watch???
review:
Maybe it's just my humble completely-non-familiar-with-Indian-culture Westerner opinion, but this movie...

Needless to say, it's not a master of subtlety - I went for what I thought was a good action movie, but I never expected it to be THIS loud, dumb, absurd and garish to the point you have no way of enjoying how well choreographed it is, how good the CGI looks, and how awesome the cinematography is because of how needlessly and excruciatingly EVERY. SINGLE. MOMENT. Is amplified by either extremely uncomfortable close-ups on horrific injuries, quick shots that give Michael Bay a run for his money, ear-piercing sound design or a... folk song about children dying... what? I know, entirely different culture, but everyone has eyes, eardrums etc. That don't need to be burst here. Also the Bollywood musical numbers... are, well, subjective, but I don't know how well they fit in a movie where people are stabbed, hanged etc. Ah, whatever, logic doesn't apply here. Best to leave this one of the shelf, at least that's what I think.

Title: BY FAR ONE OF THE BEST OF SRK
review:
First half felt like it was rushed but towards the end everything made sense judging by they showed everyone's back story in the best way possible!!

Vijay Sethupathys comedic timing was very hilarious, everyone at the theater had their laughter and the mother and son scene, definitely made everyone rolling :(. But the director did a good job directing the movie like hands down 10/10. SRK,nanthara and all the other side characters that you won't feel their side but more like main ones because of the way, they portrayed it. Hands down SRK'S best like by far the best action film. I'd put it at first and then Pathan.

Title: What a treat for SRK fans
review:
Atlee is no doubt an amateur filmmaker having rookie direction & storytelling skills. But this time he rocked the boat. Talking about the movie, here are some key points :

Positives - Action scenes, wow moments, emotional scenes, background music, acting of SRK, overall pace, social message

Negatives - Songs, storyline, romance

As a whole, the film is great. It definitely has some flaws but they can be overlooked. Sure it drew inspiration from popular movies and shows, but let me remind you "A rainbow is formed of seven colours".

Heard that they're planning for a sequel? Goddamn excited for it!!,

Title: E N T E R T A I N E R -- BOOM
review:
"A Cinematic Masterpiece"
"Jawan" is one of the best movies of the year! There are lot of scenes that will touch your heart. This movie is in the league of RRR and KGF. A solid 5/5. Literally didn't expect this type of creativity from Bollywood. Jawan has everything to offer you want to expect in a good Movie. Action, Romance, Comedy, Thriller, Emotions, in simple words Jawan is a roller coaster of emotion which put you to the edge of your seat till the very end.2 Hours and 48 Mins of Movie and Never Got Bored of any second.second. Shah Rukh Khan the one and Only and truly the Last of Stars in Bollywood ever He Totally Nailed his role. I can't imagine srk in multiple roles and he has nailed it in each and every role.

The chemistry between SRK and Nayanthara is pure magic.

Nayanthara's screen presence is just superb. Nayanthara looked pretty and did a wonderful job. Deepika has a very important character which takes the story fwd. Being Srk-Deepika truly loved their chemistry once again. Vijay Sethupathi is a perfect villain for this movie. His hindi speaking style is so soothing. Action is too good. It doesnt seem copied. Looks so original and refreshing. The ladies in the film Priyamani , Sanya Malhotra ,Riddhi Dogra , Amritha Aiyer , Sanjeeta Bhaytacharya , Ashlesha Thakur all have done a fantabulous job .ATLEE did a Freakin' hell of a Job here. I am too much Amazed by his creativity.

Title: Enough is enough
review: Shahrukh khan , salman khan and other of same age heroes are old enough and must rest and get retirement from film industry. It seems that they are signing films just for money without going through the film storyline or theme. Suitable for kids to watch this movie like superman etc . I am giving this feedback with full honesty and with sincerity.

Title: Dude ..... It is full PAISA VASOOL
Jai Jawan Jai Kisaan!! The truth of what India is facing under political power!
review: A true eye opener on social issues, gets you emotional enough- a movie that every politician should be forced to see - maybe this movie should be made tax free! It questions a lot of ongoing facts on "good governance", very neutral and clean stand and does not hint at any political party either in the past, present or future! Awesome action as it really would have happened (no fake slow-motion shots of punches or flying bullets), right balance of humour, true sense of emotion, an eye opener to question ourselves on the truth based on the insights seen in the film, and then know and realise that it is much more worse in India than what is shown only as a minimal fraction of the least fraction of the truth in this movie!

As expected sharukh khan again fires the theatres , movie is all good,full of action,story,drama, criminal.....The secene before interval will blow your mind ,{ little bit disappointment with climax }because in the movie has very masses scene but climax was so normal , nayanthara in this movie blow your mind out ,mind blowing can't tell in words nayanthara, dialogue deliveries of vijay setupati is awesome as always ,and one more thing the bgm of anirudh sir gives wings to srk action......

Vijay Sethupati, Nayanthara , Piyamani,

Title: Incredible achievement
review:
Jawan is simply incredible.

Powerful and original action scenes, stunning music, and some strong compelling characters and performances. Jawan is a feast for the senses that takes audiences through a range of emotions, creating an experience that is entertaining from beginning to end while bringing attention to some very real evils. A superb blend of flamboyant escapism and hardcore reality wrapped into just a really well written script with some great twists and turns. If you can handle violence, this movie will stay with you and inspire you. I joined IMDB today just to write this review. Congrats to everyone who was part of this achievement.

Title: Masterpiece!
review: It is an absolute delight for Bollywood enthusiasts! This film seamlessly blends action, romance, and drama, keeping the audience engaged from start to finish. The stellar performances by the cast, especially the charismatic lead actor, deliver a powerful emotional punch. The music is catchy, and the cinematography beautifully captures the essence of the story. "Jawan" is a must-watch for anyone looking for a compelling and entertaining Bollywood experience. Furthermore, The plot takes you on a rollercoaster ride, filled with unexpected twists and turns that keep you on the edge of your seat!!

Title: Overhyped
review:
While the movie in itself isn't bad, and there are definitely some parts of it which are entertaining, this could have been made such a better movie.

First of all, the story nowhere enough justified for nearly a 3 hour long film. This could easily have been cut down by half an hour, even 45minutes. The songs are just terrible, apart from one song, mostly everything else is unbearable. And unfortunately, there are a lot of them. Even the story didn't warrant more than 2-3 songs.

Lastly, and this one personally hurts the most - Vijay is super under-utilised. Understand SRK is the main face but Vijay is such a huge talent and in my view, in terms of pure acting talent, he is anyday light years ahead of SRK. It's a shame that his role doesn't really do much to justify the big hype villain he is supposed to be.

Overall, if I could do it all over again, I'd not have gone to the cinemas and rather enjoyed it when it came on OTT by skipping the songs.

Title: Mass and Class
review: It's an rollercoaster ride all the way, Shah Rukh Khan shines again and in what way, people are loving it and showing their love by whistling and clapping on each scene, fully entertainment. Action are top notch and the movie has everything and you feel like if you blink you'll miss something, so it keeps audiences glued to thier seets. Shah Rukh Khan has made this year as his own, he made a comeback and that too with a bang. Atlee has presented King Khan in a never seen before avatar and people are in awe of it, The character Vikram Rathore has now become the talk of the town, his style his class his attitude is all people are talking about.

Title: Awful and 1 star only for the first 10 min
review:
One of worst movie in bollywood's history. I am shocked and dismayed as to how it can fetch1000cr in world wide collections. I feel the quality of movies has gone down over the years, but public's tolerance for garbage has gone up. SRK does not allow other actors to hold their own. In it highly embarrassing some Indians found this movie watchable. It was a good start, but.it went south faster than a stock market crash. I would like to repeat I am not against SRK, but viewers outside the bollywood they must be laughing at the quality produced. SRK is suppose to be the unofficial ambassador for bollywood. When newcomers watch his movies, they must think if this is the best the rest must horrendous. We know there are some good gems, but they never get credit, because SRK is not pulling his weight. SRK is only responsible for his zombie fans who don't see anything wrong no matter what he does. What about your responsibility to the industry who gave so much for your poor quality acting?

Title: Atlee is a director pushing the boundaries of contemporary cinema
review:
Atlee's Jawan is a must-see film that will leave you feeling inspired and empowered. It features Shah Rukh Khan in multiple roles, showing his impressive range as an actor and delivering one of his best performances yet. The action scenes are breathtaking and the love story is heartwarming and impactful.

What's remarkable about Jawan is how it manages to pack so much into its three-hour running time. The film feels like more than just a movie - it's an immersive experience that will motivate you to take on the world. With its powerful social message, Jawan is not just entertaining, but also inspires viewers to make a positive impact in their communities.

Atlee is a director pushing the boundaries of contemporary cinema. It's exciting to see SRK collaborate with a director who understands his strengths as an actor and brings out the best in him. Jawan is a true masterpiece that will leave you feeling inspired long after the credits roll.

Title: The magic of SRK
review:
This movie is all about SRK and his magic that never fails his fans to attract to theatres. This movie must be watched in theatres with masses to feel and enjoy every scene of this movie. The regular claps and whistles of the audience makes you sure that you are watching a blockbuster. The movie has lots of social messages and with a regular interval it has new story of social message and every new story gives you absolutely new flavour and the story keeps the movie engaging and interesting.

Directed by a South director Atlee ,definitely the movie shows that the outline of the story of the movie is of a South Indian movie but with bollywood masala makes it super entertaining. The combination of South Indian director and king of Bollywood SRK is like super combination of best entertainment. VFX is of very high quality and trust me even Rohit Shetty would feel jealous after watching so many cars burning and flying. The stunts can make your heart beat a little faster. Overall a complete entertainer. A complete family movie and ofcourse a total "paisa wasool movie."

Title: MASSIEST 🔥🔥
review:
Jawan is the Massiest bollywood movie ever... A big thank you to Atlee for bringing out best from SRK as a Mass action hero. The movie has a good pace with great BGM, Good action sequences and with a Good Social Message.

SRK has been great as an Action powerpack.

Nayanthara is just woww..!!!! Hope to see her more in future Bollywood movies.

Deepika has a short but impactful role.

Vijay Sethupathi again Shines as a Strong Villain character. Could have been used better.

This movie is surely a treat to watch.... This may open new doors in Bollywood to colab with Tollywood.

It has all the elements to be a Complete BLOCKBUSTER.....!!!!! 🔥🔥🔥

Title: Horrible at best and disappointing at worst
review:
I can't even finish this movie in one go... Nad I enjoyed even 'main hoon na!'
Every single thing is horribly written and stitched!!

Hopelessly dragging multiple and neverending tracks
The actors leave no impression on my emotions, nothing feels real, not one track hits the nerve!

Young Shahrukh's face is extremely hard to watch, what sort of makeup that is? He looks better in his interviews!

So many dumb things I can't count, and I don't wanna give out spoilers 🤣... People should suffer through this movie as I did (by their own choice though)
The well known actors for their good acting are totally wasted in this movie. Did these people even read the script?

And
Why would Shahrukh make such movie?

Title: Cinema
review:
That's how you make movie-A cinema.

What a movie eh!!The actions ,vfx,performance of all the artists are top notch..the relevancy of story with current Indian political and social situation are the best part of the movie. Shahrukh Khan always has a special way to deliver the message and he has delivered this time too. Jawan is the phir bhi dil haih Hindustani in steroid.

The performance of supporting actor and actress are way too good.

I cannot stop raving about the action sequences though.some of the best action pieces I saw in last few years. THE DIRECTOR presented the protagonist in a way that as he worshipped him and his art.

Great stuff.

Title: Pathetic waste of money
review: The movie is so useless that writing a review seems like a major effort even if to criticize. They have tried to make an out and out masala movie with lots of budget and sometimes that can be a very bad mix. Makeup of SRK (son) makes an old man look plastic rather than youthful. The Dad SRK is full of overacting with nothing to offer in acting. All girls on the side are there to just add glamour but wasted as a talent. Lady made to act as SRK jail mom used to be a baby when SRK came to Bollywood it sure why they could not cast anything properly. Director has put in good efforts to make Vijay Sethupathy do bad acting.

Title: It's SRK baby
review: We usually overlook the fact how amazing an actor SRK is just because he tends to do masala films in less serious roles. But, SRK is indeed one of the finest actors India has been got. As time goes by, it's getting more obvious that SRK has saved his best works for this decade. Along with the fabulous direction by Atlee and the superb music by Anirudh, Jawan is a super entertaining movie. Even the supporting cast of this movie has done justice to their roles. I really enjoyed the movie. I will recommend everyone to watch it, specially the ones who are trying to have an exciting rollercoaster ride.

Title: Great Action Movie Addresing Social Issues
review: If you want action, drama and emotion in a movie you will get all these with an added bonus of social message regarding various touching issues which need to be addressed in a proper manner. The movie has a great plot with nice storyline with many surprising twists backed by power packed performances from SRK, Nayantara, Vijay Sethupati, Deepika Padukone and other members of the cast. The way this film is presented is very interesting and gives a great cinematic experience( especially the character Vikram Rathod is godly). The cinematography, tight screenplay so many high points aided by many bombastic entries and great cameos adds to the strength of this movie in a big way. I would have given 10 out of 10 but 9 stars is the perfect rating from the POV of a true cinema viewer. This is the best action, social drama movie I have watched.👌💯💥🙏

Title: Love a d Best wishes from Bangladesh
review:
This movie is a relentless assault on all your emotions. You'll laugh, cry, cheer. Only one word can describe this film - Epic....

JAWAN is not just a movie; it's a cinematic experience that celebrates the magic of Bollywood. It reminds us why Shah Rukh Khan is a living legend, capable of bringing characters to life with such finesse. It is a love letter to Indian cinema, a testament to the power of storytelling, and a spectacle that will leave you in awe.

In conclusion, JAWAN is a superhit that will leave you laughing, crying, and cheering. It's a testament to the enduring legacy of Shah Rukh Khan and a reminder of why we all fell in love with Bollywood in the first place. Don't miss the chance to witness this cinematic masterpiece that will undoubtedly go down in history as one of the greatest Indian films of all time. Shah Rukh Khan, you've outdone yourself once again, and we can't wait to see what you have in store for us next....

Arafat Hussain (Nayan)
From Bangladesh....

Title: SRK is in a league of his own
review:
This has to be one of the best movies ever created in India. The storyline and action is superb. There are few over the top items in this movie but it can be excused. Atlee's direction brings about a good flavor of South Indian movie industry as well as Vijay and Nayanthara adding the star cast flavour. The movie also features North East stars and location to give them some representation.

There is a monolog at the end of the movie where SRK brings down the fourth wall between Screen and real life and talks to the audience 1 on 1. Literal goosebumps can be felt at various points in the movie.

Only con that I felt was that out of the 6 ladies in his squad the backstories of only 2.5 are given.

Title: Unless you are a diehard SRK fan, movie is very mediocre
review:
If there were any other main lead, even Salman Khan, this movie would not be hyped as much as it has. It is a true SRK movie, and should be seen only for SRK. The story, dialogue, action is very mediocre, like the 80s. Movie is also meant to be a masala film, but it definitely skips logic and reality in so many places.

The songs are not going to be remembered outside the theater. Action is good in some scenes, others its not so great. Too many loopholes in story and logic. CGI is not too great either.

Movie is better in 1st half, then drags in the 2nd half....becomes a movie from the 80s.

Would recommend wait till OTT.

Title: Blockbuster-Powerfull action with Mass look of SRK
review:
First time seen SRK in such a Mass look..Kudos to Atlee to brings out best version of SRK..#Nayantara just spot on with her expression#
Vijay sethupati's character was low as compare to his reputation,may be due to language synchronisation
Mostly SRK centered film. Dutt and grover might have deep role to play insted of cameo like roles.

Msg to the people of India is spot on and very innovative. All indian has to watch the film once.

Women empowerment is visible in film as major roles are of female charactors. The film going to give boost Bollywood's sinking boat. This film will increase expection of uocoming bollywood action films.

Title: Beware of Gooseb umps
review:
SRK was tagged as failed actor 4 years ago. It seemed that his era is over. He has his own plans and he signed 3 movies for grandest comeback of brand SRK. Pathaan was blockbuster already and biggest money spinner of Indian Cinema. We thought no one can beat this one but SRK's Dil Maange More. Now come Jawan and let's see if it can beat Pathan or not

Story: Story of Pathan has nothing new. It's same bad vs good, revenge, Nayak and Hindustani type of vigilante movie. We have watched it time and again. Can't reveal much as trailer has so many questions. How father son role is designed, Is it a hijack movie or something more is there, why SRK hijacked train. So such questions should be answered in theatre only.

Review: So with age old story what makes Jawan different. I strongly believe that it's not story but execution that matters. Jawan is baap of masala movies. From first scene to last scene everything is scaled up so big that it's an experience more than a movie. There all 6 action pieces and each one is long. Every action scene will give you goosebumps. I'm not that seeti maar audience but if I know how to whistle I will surely blow some. You can't explain in words. Hats of to Atlee to give bollywood best masala movie of all time. It can be seen that he worked hard on each scene and frame so audience should remain on edge of seat. Big bow to Atlee sir. There is a cameo too which is surprise but I will not reveal much

Music: Only best part about songs is that you can have loo break because movie will not let you have one. But BGM is of another level. Movie has three stars. Atlee, SRK and Anirudh. Anirudh's music has enhanced every scene to another level with his BGM. First Master then Vikram and now this. Hope Leo will be of same level.

Performance: I have no apprehensions to say that it's the best SRK has performed ever. You can't take your eyes of his swag and style. He has many different looks. I thought first scene is SRK's career's best but scene after scene he proved me wrong. Every scene of his is better than last. Nayanthra looked great as cop. I can't imagine these zero figure bollywood actresses in such role. Vijay Sethupati is treat. Way he induce humor in evil is brilliant. All girls are decent though they don't have much to do other than looking fit and fierce. Deepika has small role and it's a cakewalk for her caliber. Sunil Grover have nothing much to do.

Verdict: In my 31 years I have never watched a movie twice intentionally but I will go for it again and that sums up all.

Title: Just WoW!
review: True Massy film! Full on paisa vasool... Everyone can enjoy it with there family...Shah Rukh Khan, Vijay Sethupathi,Nayanthara,Deepika,Atlee,Anirudh and many more are just rocked there roles... There are many scenes where people can whistle and enjoy...I gave it 10* because it deserves it... Songs are also good to hear... They turn the theatre into stadiums... Shah Rukh Khan play so many characters in this film...Every character is better than another...The way Atlee presented him on screen it just mesmerizing... Every time he appears into the screen people are going mad for him...Longevity of King Khan is unmatchable!

Title: Old wine in new bottle
review:
Sad to see the over hype of the movie. Such kind of story line has seen an endless time in a South movie with an endless actor like Mahesh babu, Vijay, allu arjun, Kamal hassan especially, and Vikram. The content is old. Message has been sent several times to society on this storyline. Nothing new. For mass appealing, no doubt Shahrukh has a different kind of aura. But for such kind of movie, swag of south actors are altogether different. You can copy it, but the original is original. Shahrukh has taken risks, and probably this makes me admire him. He always gives 100 percent and to go beyond the comfort zone.

Atlee direction was good but not his best that we have already seen in Bigil, Marsal,Theri. There is no doubt that this movie is not for south audience.

Acting wise Shahrukh was o.k. But much appreciation needed for Vijay Sethupathi whose performance was awesome and in many part he helped to take movie in right direction. Nayanthara was good. Rest of the cast has nothing to do in the movie.

Songs of the movie was average but background was the soul of the movie without you can't sit for an hour (if you are watching movie not consider himself SRK fan)

Title: Disappointing Experience
review:
From the high expectations set by the trailer, I was hoping for an engaging and thrilling story, but the film failed to deliver on multiple fronts.

Firstly, the plot seemed to lack originality and depth. It followed a predictable path, and the storytelling felt forced, leaving no room for any significant surprises. The characters were underdeveloped, making it hard to connect with or care about their journeys.

The pacing of the movie was inconsistent, with slow moments that left me disengaged, followed by rushed sequences that felt abrupt and poorly thought out. The lackluster dialogue and subpar acting only added to the overall mediocrity of the film.

It's unfortunate to say that "Jawan" failed to live up to the hype and left me feeling like I had wasted my time and money. I would not recommend this movie to anyone looking for a compelling cinematic experience.

Title: Choreography, bgm, dialogues, action sequences, songs, directions, story, everyone's acting etc are on top notch
review:
Choreography,bgm,dialogues action sequences, songs, directions, story, everyone's acting etc are on top notch.

Srk sir apko leker jitna bolu utna kam hain what an amazing performance hat's off. Vijay sethputi just wow.

Nayanthara played an outstanding role. 15 to 29 mins of deepika performance just steal the show. Sunil grover, pillu mani, Sangeeta leker khan ,girija, ridhi ,yogi babu all you have done a great job. Not only fans but also neutral are extremely happy even shower their love, are dancing clapping. Aisi movie banni chahiye and sabko dekhna chahiye. Totally theatrical experience .

Title: Jawan (Batman) of Bollywood (Gotham)
review:
Just watch the film with a fair heart. I won't say anyone hasn't watched such a film before...but I would say that no one watched Shahrukh doing this type of film before.

The cinematography and background music match the swag and it gives real goosebumps. The movie is very exciting and thrilling. The actions are good but the BGM makes those scenes more eye-shattering.

No movie is perfect. But for entertainment purposes, this film will surely entertain you.

This film also talks about the social and political issues of our third-world countries and makes us ask questions which we have not asked ourselves in decades.

Title: Great Direction and visuals. Bold but overdone storyline
review:
Whether people agree to like a storyline line or not, I think moviegoers should agree to appreciate and acknowledge two things. One that the younger directors are bringing very impressive skills to the screen, and next, SRK is someone who excels in reinventing himself. This is character is carried out very far and different from the "Raj" and "Rahul" SRK we remember. SRK is charismatic and he is hardworking, both of these attributes are full on throughout the movie!

This is a movie for all SRK fans. This is a movie for people who like to go to the theater and watch stories play out. It is high-speed and thriller. The storyline is something that has been seen before just with different topics that do impact people in their everyday lives unfortunately. If only we had such heros who did fight for such matters on such grand scales.... There a couple of guest appearances by other stars which makes this movie-filmy. Bollywood filmy. Songs are nothing overtop. Many of us will probably remember the tunes of Pathaan for some time, the songs in Jawan, not so much. Overall, it is a good money's worth movie to go watch. The direction is beautiful. It is dark and gives you a Gothic Batman vibe in some scenes. Go watch it!

Title: Bad direction and screenplay ruined a good storyline
SRK never before avatar
review:
Watched shah rukh khan's much anticipated film Jawan in Vue Cinemas, Reading,UK yesterday 1st Day 1st Show. What a film, what scenes created by Atlee, these weren't expected. Wonderful, marvellous and captivating scenes and acting by SRK . Would love and definitely would watch the movie a couple of times more.

Vijay Sethupathi was ruthless. A brisk role by Deepika Padukone and what an impact she made. The film had everything, Romance, Fight sequences, Comedy & Smart acting and afterall emotion that would glue you to the edge of the seat. A must watch for all as it has a good message for the citizens of India.

I would definitely suggest this film for everyone.

Title: TERRIBLE. AWFUL. LACK OF SERIOUSNESS.
review: Sharukh Khan needs to get serious!!! Times are changing and so should his approach on movies. Deepika Padukone on the other hand shouldn't involve herself with projects that are sub per and mediocre. Did she read the script?? The movie had no idealistic execution, it needed actors whom people like to carry it. While the political message was key, the action, intro, romance and the kid's part was very unnecessary plus Sharukh playing two lead roles!!!!! Come on, let's be serious. Bollywood is now international, the Koreans are even making good movies than Bollywood!!! I'm from Africa by the way.

Title: Full masala entertainer
review: This one has all the nuances of a proper South movie and in out and out a masala entertainer. SRK was fantastic and so was Nayanthara. SRK delivers a remarkable performance as Aman, showcasing his versatility as an actor. He effortlessly portrays the complexities of a soldier's life, his patriotism, and the vulnerability he experiences when love enters his life There are nice twists and story otherwise is simple and plain old but with nice underlying messages. The action sequences were really captivating. Altee has created a great product and Jawan is here to rule the box office! A must watch!

Title: A star with a message
review:
Like most of the movies where agenda is only action and patriotism, this movie has multiple messages for politicians and is presented well in SRK and Atlees bad as* style.

The movie has everything to make it complete entertainer. Good action, some romance, songs and good direction in overall.

It will not bore u for a minute in its almost 3hrs of run time.

Vijay Setupathi was good as a villain however the accent was a but disappointment.

Nayanthara as lead and Deepika's cameo played a good part in the movie.

The team of girls lead by Srk was also the leading factor for the films overall success.
